steps.title: Connect influence to naming
steps.content: The first sentence says Okot p'Bitek's poem inspired East African writers. The next sentence says writers who adopted its style are called Okot School poets, which naturally follows from that influence.

steps.title: Choose the fitting transition
steps.content: A and D signal contrast, but the naming does not oppose the poem's influence. C signals comparison, but the sentence is not comparing two separate groups. The answer is B.
